zh.lifeSummary: 當Helena de Felbrigg於1390年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可費爾布利格時，她的父親Simon Bigod de Felbrigge18歲，母親Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE15歲。她於大約1414年與William Tyndale在英國諾薩普頓史爾迪尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1458年在英國英格蘭素福爾可波福德享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾伊頓 索孔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helena de Felbrigg于1390年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可費爾布利格时，她的父亲Simon Bigod de Felbrigge18岁，母亲Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE15岁。她于大约1414年与William Tyndale在英国諾薩普頓史爾迪尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1458年在英国英格兰素福爾可波福德享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾伊頓 索孔。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Helena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Helena de Felbrigg was born in 1390, in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Simon Bigod de Felbrigge, was 18 and her mother, Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE, was 15. She married William Tyndale about 1414, in Deene, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1458, in Boxford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Eaton Socon, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helena de Felbrigg est née en 1390, à Felbrigg, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon Bigod de Felbrigge, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé William Tyndale environ 1414, à Deene, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1458, à Boxford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Eaton Socon, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Eaton Socon, Huntingdonshire District, C: Eaton Socon, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Helena de Felbrigg 1390 in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon Bigod de Felbrigge 18 und ihre Mutter Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE 15. Sie hat um 1414 in Deene, Northamptonshire, England William Tyndale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1458 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Boxford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Eaton Socon, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helena de Felbrigg è nata il nel 1390 nel Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Simon Bigod de Felbrigge, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato William Tyndale circa 1414, nel Deene, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1458, nel Boxford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Eaton Socon, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Helena de Felbriggが1390年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクフエルブリググで生まれた時，父Simon Bigod de Felbriggeは18歳，母Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGEは15歳であった。約1414年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアディーンでWilliam Tyndaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1458年にイギリスイギリススフォルクボクスフォードで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアエアトン ソコンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Helena de Felbrigg(이)가 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 프브리그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon Bigod de Felbrigge(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1414년 영국 노르섬프토실르 디니에서 William Tyndale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 보스퍼드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이턴 소콘에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helena de Felbrigg nasceu em 1390, em Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon Bigod de Felbrigge, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com William Tyndale aproximadamente 1414, em Deene, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1458, em Boxford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Eaton Socon, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Eaton Socon, Huntingdonshire District, C: Eaton Socon, Cambridgeshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helena de Felbrigg родилась в 1390 г. в местности фелбриг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Simon Bigod de Felbrigge было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Tyndale около 1414 г. в местности дин, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1458 г. в местности боксфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности эатон сокон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helena de Felbrigg nació en 1390, en Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon Bigod de Felbrigge, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE, tenía 15 años. Se casó con William Tyndale aproximadamente 1414, en Deene, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1458, en Boxford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Eaton Socon, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
